title: Temporal Threads of Space (TTS)
description: This mod adds a new type of energy - temporal energy, with which you can control the space-time continuum.
body:
# TEMPORAL THREADS OF SPACE
**Have you long wanted to play minecraft with an unusual fantasy mod for temporal and spatial shifts?**

**Temporal Threads of Space mod** is perfect for you!

- Get temporal bundles of enegry, move to the **multiverse** and create **unique temporal items**!
- Stop time or return yourself **back in time**!
- Create **portal systems**!
- Become absolutely **immortal**!
- Create and control a **black hole**!

Let's study temporal energy!

 
# MOD GUIDE
⬇️ **Download**: [Mod guide on google disk](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/106a3C4k2FIDKUJrHdh9ORfG5JPmpZvOo?usp=sharing)

There is an English and Russian version of the guide ✅.

 
# NEWS
English: [Telegram](https://t.me/temporal_threads_of_space)

Russian: [Telegram](https://t.me/temporal_threads_of_space_rus)
